title: docs: add Flux/Z-Image RunPod + SDXL Turbo to GPU docs and monitoring
author: voodoohop

gist.headline: Mapping the GPU garden
gist.blurb: Updated our internal maps to track the new RunPod GPU instances powering Flux and Z-Image. Keeping the monitoring tools sharp so we always know what's buzzing.
gist.summary: Updated internal documentation and Claude monitoring skills to track new RunPod GPU instances for Flux and Z-Image generation.
gist.impact: Maintainers and AI agents can now accurately monitor the health and status of the latest image generation infrastructure.
gist.visual_concept: Polly the bee and the Monitor Robot acting as system admins, looking at a glowing dashboard or map of server nodes. Represents tracking and monitoring infrastructure.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny hard hat, looking at a glowing retro terminal screen alongside a chunky monitor-head robot. The screen displays a map of glowing server nodes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny hard hat, looking at a glowing retro terminal screen alongside a chunky monitor-head robot. The screen displays a map of glowing server nodes. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley.
